description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with test and dist stages and a default before_script that links Config-CI.mk, sets CC to "ccache ${CC:-gcc}", and fetches all v* tags from the repository. In the test stage add an alpine job using the registry.gitlab.com/craigbarnes/dockerfiles/cdev-alpine image that runs the .test script: make vvars || (make dump-generated-makefiles; exit 1), make, cat build/gen/build-defs.h, ldd dte, make check, make check LDFLAGS=-static, then the fragment-2 commands (make DEBUG=0 && make installcheck, strip dte && du -k -h dte, tools/objsize.sh dte, make bench DEBUG=0 CFLAGS=-O3); add an android job using the android-ndk image, manual, that runs make CC="$CC_AARCH64", cat build/gen/build-defs.h, make CC="$CC_ARMV7A", make CC="$CC_I686", make CC="$CC_X86_64"; add an arch job using the cdev-arch image that runs make vvars …, make check-source check-clang-tidy, make check USE_SANITIZER=1, make coverage-xml, then the fragment-2 commands, and publishes a cobertura coverage report at build/coverage.xml as an artifact named ${CI_JOB_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHA} expiring in 30 days; add a debian job using the cdev-debian image, manual, that runs a series of make check commands with various CC and flags, then make clean && make distcheck, and make bench DEBUG=0 CFLAGS=-O3. Also create debian-oldstable, rocky-8, rocky-9, and ubuntu jobs that extend the manual .test configuration with their respective images and run manually. In the dist stage add a pages job extending .pages with the cdev-arch image that runs make docs htmlgz-aux, make gcovr-html, make portable, lists the generated tarballs and tree, and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact named dte-$CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA expiring in 60 days with a coverage regex, running only on the master branch; add a pages:non-master job with the same steps but triggered on non‑master branches. No caches or services are defined and the only deployment target is GitLab Pages.
